title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.320 - Election — ballot form
text:
190.320.  Election — ballot form. — Before any governing body may establish emergency telephone service and impose an emergency telephone tax under the provisions of sections 190.300 to 190.320, it shall submit a proposal to its voters for the approval of such service and such tax.  The ballot of submission shall contain, but need not be limited to, the following language:
(L. 1981 H.B. 437 § 5)
